title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 171.034 - Provision of food services by school districts eligible to reduce make-up days
text:
171.034.  Provision of food services by school districts eligible to reduce make-up days. — Any school district that is eligible to reduce its requirement to make up days pursuant to subsection 3 of section 171.033 may provide food service on a summer school food service basis if it resumes school with double sessions.
(L. 2006 S.B. 769 § 1) 
Effective 5-31-06
